<!-- What problem does this feature solve? Who is affected? -->

<!-- Describe what you'd like to happen. Be specific about the user experience. -->

<!--
As a [persona], I want to [action], so that [outcome].

## Impact

- **Users affected**: <!-- e.g., All buyers, Dealers with 50+ orders/month -->
- **Priority**: <!-- Critical / High / Medium / Low -->
